description: Verify the existing project builds and tests pass before making changes. Restore dependencies and run full test suite to establish green baseline.
steps: Run 'dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln' to restore all NuGet packages
Run 'dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln' to verify the project compiles cleanly
Run 'dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal' to confirm all existing tests pass
Run 'npx cdk synth' to verify CDK synthesis works
acceptance_criteria: dotnet test shows all existing tests passing (currently 30 tests)
npx cdk synth produces CloudFormation template without errors
findings: All 31 tests pass and cdk synth succeeds. IMPORTANT: NODE_OPTIONS env var must be unset before running dotnet test or npx cdk synth because it references a non-existent preload module (/opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js) that crashes the JSII Node.js child process. Use 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && <command>' for all commands that invoke Node.js via JSII.
